description_long: This is a compact, boxy camper vehicle with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a large black windshield at the front and a prominent satellite dish mounted on the roof. The sides display a bold 'TV' graphic, suggesting it may serve as a mobile broadcast or media van. The camper has multiple windows, including a large front window and smaller side windows, as well as a side entry door and a rear ladder for roof access. The roof is equipped with technical equipment, including a satellite dish and what appears to be an air conditioning unit or vent. The vehicle rides on six wheels, with visible side mirrors and a detailed cab interior. Various cables, handles, and access panels are present, indicating functional compartments and interactive features.
description: A blue and white camper van with a large front windshield, roof-mounted satellite dish, and 'TV' graphics on the sides, featuring multiple windows, a side door, and technical roof equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black windshield, headlights, side mirrors, and the satellite dish on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'TV' graphic, side window, entry door, and visible cab interior with the satellite dish above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ladder for roof access, rear access panel, and the satellite dish angled to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the 'TV' graphic, side window, entry door, and the cab interior with the satellite dish above.
attribute_window_configuration: one large rectangular front window, one small rectangular window on each side
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
